prompt: A flawless, highly refractive clear glass cube rests perfectly centered upon an undulating, surreal pink desert landscape, dotted with bioluminescent flora, under a diffused twilight sky. Lit by gentle, volumetric global illumination, it casts subtle chromatic refractions. Rendered in Octane with physically-based glass materials and art-directed shading, emphasizing soft subsurface scattering on the landscape, evoking ethereal wonder in a wide, slightly low-angle shot.
